decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost, efficient creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By combining disruptive spells like Counterspell with card selection from Brainstorm and Ponder, the deck aims to maintain tempo and pressure on the opponent. Tolarian Terror and Cryptic Serpent provide strong threats while spells like Deem Inferior and Lórien Revealed help to dig for additional resources. With a focus on cheap and versatile spells, this Mono Blue Aggro deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure a quick victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through removal spells and board wipes while generating value with creature tokens and card draw effects. Additionally, the deck utilizes graveyard hate to disrupt opponents' strategies and maintain control of the battlefield. The inclusion of creatures like Crypt Rats and Troll of Khazad-dûm provides additional ways to clear the board and close out the game. The deck aims to establish a dominant board presence and outvalue opponents in order to secure victory in a Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this Pauper Aggro - Burn deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent through a combination of direct damage spells and creatures like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather. Utilizing cards like Fiery Temper, Fireblast, and Lightning Bolt, the deck aims to keep up a steady stream of burn spells while also presenting threats on the board with creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Sneaky Snacker. The deck also includes card draw and looting effects like Faithless Looting to maintain card advantage and ensure a consistent flow of burn spells.

This deck is focused on aggressively attacking the opponent with low-cost creatures and burn spells in order to quickly reduce their life total to zero. The deck utilizes cards like Galvanic Blast, Goblin Bushwhacker, and Lightning Bolt to deal direct damage to the opponent, while also benefiting from the synergy between Burning-Tree Emissary and Goblin Tomb Raider. Clockwork Percussionist and Rally at the Hornburg provide additional ways to pump up the creatures for a final push towards victory. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient threats while maintaining pressure throughout the game.

The deck focuses on using sacrifice and removal spells to control the board while generating card advantage through sacrificing creatures and artifacts. It also includes some lifegain options to help stabilize against aggressive decks. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent through efficient removal and consistent card draw, eventually overwhelming them with card advantage and powerful threats like Crypt Rats and Troll of Khazad-dûm. The Golgari/Jund color combination allows for a versatile and resilient control strategy in the Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize low-cost creatures and spells to maintain a fast-paced, aggressive strategy. By combining sacrifice effects with cards like Fanatical Offering and Gixian Infiltrator, the deck aims to control the board while continuously putting pressure on the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of graveyard hate cards like Nihil Spellbomb helps disrupt opponent strategies and further strengthens the deck's ability to control the game. With a mix of removal spells, creature buffs, and resource management cards, this deck looks to overwhelm opponents with a relentless onslaught.

This deck focuses on utilizing sacrifice effects and land destruction to disrupt your opponent while building up your own resources. By sacrificing artifacts and lands with cards like Writhing Chrysalis, Fanatical Offering, and Cleansing Wildfire, you can generate value and control the board. Refurbished Familiar and Gixian Infiltrator provide additional sacrifice fodder, while Nihil Spellbomb helps disrupt graveyard strategies. Eviscerator's Insight and Cast Down offer removal options, and Lembas can help stabilize your life total. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver your opponent through a combination of aggression and disruption.

The focus of this deck is to utilize the combo of Songs of the Damned and Reaping the Graves to generate a large amount of mana and bring back multiple creatures from the graveyard. By cycling through cards like Street Wraith and Monstrous Carabid, the deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard and fuel its combo pieces. Utilizing efficient resource cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures and powerful graveyard recursion.

This deck focuses on utilizing gates to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategies. By using a combination of removal spells like Journey to Nowhere and Writhing Chrysalis, alongside creatures like Outlaw Medic and Guardian of the Guildpact, the deck aims to maintain board presence and outvalue the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes a variety of gates to provide flexibility and consistency in mana production. Overall, this control-gates archetype looks to control the game through a mix of removal, board presence, and efficient mana usage.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through the use of various Gates and spells, while utilizing creatures like Sacred Cat and Squadron Hawk to maintain board presence. The deck also includes cards like Counterspell and Prismatic Strands to protect against opposing threats, as well as removal spells like Journey to Nowhere. The inclusion of cards such as The Modern Age and Lórien Revealed provide additional support and card advantage. Overall, this deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver opponents with a combination of control elements and gate synergy.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle using low-cost creatures and spells. By efficiently countering opponents' plays and maintaining a strong card advantage through draw spells, the deck aims to consistently apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes methods to control the board and protect its creatures, empowering them to deal damage and secure the win.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with elves and using cards like Lead the Stampede and Winding Way to refill your hand with more creatures. Timberwatch Elf and Priest of Titania provide additional mana and can help buff your creatures for a strong aggro strategy. Generous Ent and Avenging Hunter offer powerful creatures to overwhelm your opponent, while Masked Vandal can deal with any pesky artifacts or enchantments. Overall, this deck aims to flood the board with elves and quickly overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of aggressive creatures.

This Mono Black Aggro Pauper deck focuses on quickly building up a strong board presence with low-cost creatures such as Bloodthrone Vampire, Carrion Feeder, and Mortician Beetle. The deck also includes cards like Rite of Consumption and Sadistic Glee to capitalize on sacrificing creatures for additional value. With removal spells like Snuff Out and a potential pump spell like Mutagenic Growth, this deck aims to overwhelm and outpace the opponent with a combination of aggression and resource management.

This deck focuses on swarming the board with low-cost Elf creatures and generating massive amounts of mana with cards like Priest of Titania and Llanowar Elves. Timberwatch Elf and Nyxborn Hydra serve as powerful win condition cards, while Quirion Ranger and Generous Ent provide utility and additional advantages. The deck also includes card draw and creature search with Lead the Stampede and Winding Way, ensuring a steady stream of threats. Overall, the strategy revolves around overwhelming the opponent with a relentless onslaught of Elves while maintaining advantage through efficient card selection and mana ramp.

The deck focuses on using control elements such as counterspells and removal spells to control the pace of the game. It also utilizes flicker effects like Ephemerate to generate extra value from enters-the-battlefield effects on creatures like Augur of Bolas and Mulldrifter. The deck aims to constantly disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating card advantage through card draw spells like Brainstorm and Behold the Multiverse. By effectively managing resources and consistently out-valuing the opponent, the deck aims to establish control of the game and eventually close out the game with powerful finishers like Murmuring Mystic and Lórien Revealed.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using creatures like Overgrown Battlement and Axebane Guardian, while using cards like Land Grant and Lead the Stampede to find combo pieces like Balustrade Spy and Dread Return. The goal is to combo off by milling your entire deck with Balustrade Spy's ability and then bringing back Lotleth Giant or Nyxborn Hydra with Dread Return to deal lethal damage to your opponent. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Mesmeric Fiend and Masked Vandal to help protect the combo.
